issues.title: [Investigation] Reproduce growable upgrade stall in office demand flow
issues.body:
Summary: the stall is reproducible when growable upgrades cross the existing office demand boundary.
Current evidence: the validation path fails on the affected scenario.
Conclusion: this is an actual failure that blocks delivery.

issues.title: [Software Investigation] Classify post-v0.2.x default runtime behavior changes
issues.body:
Summary: track the release-gate classification for the runtime behavior shift.
Current evidence: no reproduced signal yet.
Conclusion: keep this as a blocker tracker until more evidence arrives.

issues.title: [Software Evidence] Mixed buyer recovery in validation trace
issues.body:
Evidence summary: captured logs and counters for reference.
Current evidence: the trace is reusable but does not add a new failure signal this week.
Conclusion: artifact collection only.

issues.title: [Bug] Regression in telemetry counters after load
issues.body:
Summary: telemetry counters reset after load.
Expected: counters remain stable.
Steps to reproduce: load a saved state and inspect the counter values.
